app.title: LED Mesh Toolkit
app.tagline: Geometry reconstruction · LED mesh modeling · Export

home.title: Projects
home.description: Pick a recent project to continue, or seed a new mesh geometry project from an example.
home.empty: No recent projects. Seed one from an example below, or open an existing folder.
home.actionsDesc: Examples ship with complete measurement sets and config — design / preview / export flow ready out of the box.

design.title: Screen Design
design.description: Switch modes to edit mask, reference points, baseline. Edits push to the undo stack; Save writes project.yaml.

banner.methodPending: Design ready · pick your measurement method

method.title: Method
method.description: Pick how you'll measure cabinet vertices for this project.

m1.title: M1 · Total Station
m1.desc: Use a total station to capture vertex coordinates as CSV.

m2.title: M2 · Visual Back-Calc
m2.desc: Recover surface from ArUco/Charuco photos taken with any camera.

method.coexistNote: Switching preserves existing data — measurements/ and aruco/ directories coexist, swap any time.

confirmSwitch.title: Switch method
confirmSwitch.body: Switching to {target}. Existing data is preserved and you can switch back any time.

mismatch.m1Only: This page is M1-only. Current method: {current}.
mismatch.m2Only: This page is M2-only. Current method: {current}.

preview.title: 3D Preview
preview.description: Reconstruct mesh from current measurements and preview it. Export to Disguise / Unreal / Neutral coordinate systems.

import.title: Import Measurements
import.description: Load measurements from Trimble CSV or hand-written measured.yaml.

charuco.title: ChArUco Pattern
charuco.description: M2 visual back-calculation. Implemented in the M2 (visual BA) session. M0.2 only ships the route.

photoplan.title: Photo Plan
photoplan.description: M2 visual back-calculation. Implemented in the M2 (visual BA) session. M0.2 only ships the route.

runs.title: Reconstruction Runs
runs.description: Metadata for every reconstruction run. Click a row to expand the full JSON report.
runs.empty: No runs yet. Trigger one from the Preview view.

instruct.title: Instruction Card
instruct.description: Field instruction card: screen layout + reference points + target labels.
instruct.empty: Click above to generate the preview.
